data.title: TruVideo launches Video Quality Score to improve customer experience and revenue. AI-powered for transportation industry.
data.description: Improved inspection videos are revolutionizing customer satisfaction and revenue growth. Based in Wellesley, Massachusetts, on January 20, 2026, TruVideo unveiled its latest innovation in AI-enhanced video and messaging solutions for the transportation sector. This advancement aims to enhance the customer experience while driving revenue growth.

data.title: Saddlehill Winery in New Jersey wins "Best of Class" for Red Blend at 2026 San Francisco Chronicle Wine Competition, from 5,500 entries.
data.description: In Voorhees, New Jersey, on January 20, 2026, Saddlehill, a top estate winery in the state, reached a major accomplishment at the 2026 San Francisco Chronicle Wine Competition, the world's largest event for North American wines. This year's competition featured a record-breaking 5,500 entries.

data.title: Fortem Technologies launches DroneHunter® 5.0 to counter swarm attacks. First deliveries underway. Improvements in autonomous capabilities and maneuverability.
data.description: In Lindon, Utah, Fortem Technologies, a key player in airspace security and anti-drone solutions, has unveiled the initial customer shipments of its advanced DroneHunter® 5.0 autonomous interceptor. This latest model enhances the capability to counter coordinated attacks by multiple drones. Compared to its predecessors, DroneHunter 5.0 marks a significant advancement with enhanced autonomous navigation, decision-making, and capture speed. This launch signifies a notable development in the realm of drone defense technology.

data.title: Transcat will host Q3 FY2026 conference call on Feb 3, 2026, at 4:30pm ET. Major event for stakeholders.
data.description: Rochester, New York - Transcat will be holding their third quarter fiscal year 2026 conference call and webcast on Tuesday, February 3, 2026, at 4:30 p.m. EST. The event is for investors and stakeholders to discuss the company's performance and financial results.

data.title: ServiceNow and OpenAI team up to advance enterprise AI outcomes through enhanced collaboration in Santa Clara.
data.description: ServiceNow and OpenAI have announced an expanded partnership in Santa Clara, California. The collaboration aims to enhance AI experiences and drive enterprise AI outcomes.

data.title: U.S. stock futures drop as Trump threatens tariffs on Europe, Dow Jones -1.66%, S&P 500 -1.79%, Nasdaq 100 -2.23%. BHP Group down 1.65% despite positive guidance. Alibaba falls 2.35%.
data.description: U.S. stock futures dropped on Tuesday post Friday's declines due to President Trump's tariff threat on Europe. The Federal Reserve is likely maintaining current interest rates in January according to CME Group. The 10-year Treasury bond yielded 4.28%, the two-year was at 3.57%. Index Performance: Dow Jones -1.66%, S&P 500 -1.79%, Nasdaq 100 -2.23%, Russell 2000 -2.17%. ETFs tracking S&P 500 and Nasdaq 100 were lower in premarket: SPY down 1.40% at $682.01, QQQ declined 1.67% to $610.68. Stocks in focus were BHP Group down 1.65% despite positive production news, Alibaba dropped 2.35% post ByteDance challenge.

data.title: Q4 earnings season starts, companies like Netflix and Intel reporting. Netflix estimated to report earnings of 55 cents per share on revenue of $11.97B.
data.description: This week marks the acceleration of the Q4 earnings season, with major players in various sectors set to release their financial reports. Key industries such as airlines, healthcare, and industrial sectors, alongside prominent names in streaming and semiconductors, are scheduled to announce their earnings. Scheduled for Tuesday, Jan. 20, before the market opens are 3M Company (NYSE: MMM), D.R. Horton, Inc. (NYSE: DHI), and U.S. Bancorp (NYSE: USB). Following the market close, streaming behemoth Netflix, Inc. (NASDAQ: NFLX) will report its Q4 earnings. Analysts anticipate earnings of 55 cents per share on revenue of $11.97, according to estimates from Benzinga Pro. Investors are keen on Netflix’s performance during the holiday season, driven by successful releases such as NFL games.

data.title: Elementor One revolutionizes website creation on WordPress, integrating creation, optimization, and site management. Tel Aviv, Jan. 20, 2026.
data.description: Elementor, a trusted company among creators, has recently launched a groundbreaking offering that combines creation, optimization, and site management into one seamless experience. This milestone product enhances the already popular Elementor Editor. The announcement was made in Tel Aviv, Israel on January 20, 2026.

data.title: Crittora unveils Agent Permission Protocol (APP) for AI agents, aiding in secure review and production; introduced on Jan. 20, 2026.
data.description: New Smyrna Beach, Florida - On January 20th, 2026, Crittora launched the Agent Permission Protocol (APP) as part of the Secure Agent Readiness Program. This initiative assists security and platform teams in seamlessly transitioning action-taking agents from review to production. The APP provides execution-time authorization and aims to enhance the efficiency of this process.

data.title: DISC Surgery Center in Tarzana opens as AAAHC-accredited; offers spine, joint, pain care in San Fernando Valley. TriasMD announces expansion.
data.description: A new facility has been established in Newport Beach to enhance outpatient spine, joint, and interventional pain care accessibility in the San Fernando Valley area. TriasMD, the parent company of DISC Surgery Centers, disclosed that the DISC Surgery Center located in Tarzana has been expanded as of January 20, 2026. This move aims to boost medical services in the region for patients requiring specialized spine, joint, and pain treatments.

data.title: Molekule unveils Mo™ and Mo Glow™ smart ultrasonic humidifiers for balanced home air; a new era of air health.
data.description: A new sub-brand specializing in air care has been launched along with a smart ultrasonic humidifier to bring back balanced humidity levels for increased comfort, wellness, and improved air quality. This announcement was made in Palm Beach Gardens, Florida on January 20, 2026. Molekule, a renowned brand excelling in indoor air purification, introduced these innovations to cater to the growing demand for better air quality. Stay tuned for more updates on these products from the leading company in this sector.

data.title: Horizon Capital invests in 124 MW wind power project in Ukraine; uses $1.8 billion fund.
data.description: In Davos, Switzerland on January 20, 2026, Horizon Capital, a prominent private equity firm operating in Emerging Europe, disclosed the first phase completion of its Horizon Capital Catalyst Fund. This reconstruction-centered fund, known as HCCF or Catalyst Fund, has amassed $1.8 billion for management. The announcement was made today during a gathering held by the firm.

data.title: GO Airport Shuttle offers 10% discount for FIFA attendees in World Cup host cities. Book now at GOWithUs.com.
data.description: On January 20, 2026, GO Airport Shuttle, known as GOWithUs.com, a leading airport ground transportation company in North America, announced a special promotion. They are providing a ten percent discount for FIFA attendees in almost all World Cup host cities. This offer is available for fans, families, and all attendees booking airport transportation services through the company.
